narrative:
Precinct Dover 3-A (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 654 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
